packet.aspect_ratio_reason: Versatile aspect ratio suitable for digital marketing campaigns and smart home product advertisements balancing horizontal and vertical composition.
packet.positive_prompt: Modern living room with contemporary furniture, visible smart speaker, smart thermostat, tablet displaying generic home automation UI, clean bright indoor lighting, neutral modern color scheme, no people, no visible logos or text
packet.negative_prompt: Visible brand logos, text, watermarks, people, editorial content, copyrighted UI, public figures
